bug_report.summary: Debugger no longer shows the "Debug session started." message in Output/Stack Trace area after starting a debug session
steps_to_reproduce: Create and open a new project.
Create a new scene with a Node root; do not attach any scripts.
(Observe the Output/Stack Trace area at the bottom left.)
expected_behaviors: An informational line such as "Debug session started." is shown when the debug session begins (as in the before build).
actual_behaviors: The "Debug session started." line is not shown in the after build (the area appears empty at that moment).
